name: union_list_partial_claimed
description: M3d CLAIMED (union WITH a list arm): union (int | list<int>) with a partial array [1, 'bad', 2]. No arm try_casts, so the lenient pass runs: the int arm's coerce_array_to_singular yields Int 1 (the bad-numeric-string item is a PROVEN error, excluded) carrying UnionMatch+FirstMatch (score 1) but scalar, while the list arm yields [1,2] (ArrayItemParseError(1), score 2, composite). pick_best's scalar-vs-composite rule devalues the FirstMatch scalar behind the composite list, so [1,2] wins. want captured from BAML final parse.
